# AWS Kinesis

Imports AWS Kinesis Firehose delivery streams and Kinesis Data Analytics applications as Dagster assets. Materialization triggers stream delivery or starts an analytics application; an optional observation sensor emits `AssetMaterialization` events for active streams and running applications.

## Required packages

```
boto3>=1.26.0
botocore>=1.29.0
```

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `aws_region` | `str` | AWS region |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `poll_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Sensor poll interval in seconds |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"aws_kinesis"` | Asset group name for all imported assets |
| `description` | `str` | ‚Äî | Description for the AWS Kinesis component |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `filter_by_name_pattern` | `str` | ‚Äî | Regex pattern to filter entities by name |
| `filter_by_tags` | `str` | ‚Äî | Comma-separated tag keys to filter entities (e.g., 'env,team') |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `aws_access_key_id` | `str` | ‚Äî | AWS access key ID (optional if using IAM role) |
| `aws_secret_access_key` | `str` | ‚Äî | AWS secret access key (optional if using IAM role) |
| `aws_session_token` | `str` | ‚Äî | AWS session token for temporary credentials (optional) |
| `import_firehose_streams` | `bool` | `true` | Import Firehose delivery streams as materializable assets |
| `import_analytics_applications` | `bool` | `true` | Import Data Analytics applications as materializable assets |
| `exclude_name_pattern` | `str` | ‚Äî | Regex pattern to exclude entities by name |
| `generate_sensor` | `bool` | `true` | Generate observation sensor for delivery streams and applications |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.AWSKinesisComponent
attributes:
  aws_region: us-east-1
  aws_access_key_id: "{{ env('AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID') }}"
  aws_secret_access_key: "{{ env('AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY') }}"
  import_firehose_streams: true
  import_analytics_applications: true
  filter_by_name_pattern: "^prod-"
  group_name: aws_kinesis
```

## Asset Dependencies & Lineage

This component supports a `deps` field for declaring upstream Dagster asset dependencies:

```yaml
attributes:
  # ... other fields ...
  deps:
    - raw_orders              # simple asset key
    - raw/schema/orders       # asset key with path prefix
```

`deps` draws lineage edges in the Dagster asset graph without loading data at runtime. Use it to express that this asset depends on upstream tables or assets produced by other components.

Dependencies can also be wired externally via `map_resolved_asset_specs()` in `definitions.py` ‚Äî the same approach used by [Dagster Designer](https://github.com/eric-thomas-dagster/dagster_designer).
